rationale: No events this cycle meaningfully affect Portugal — Beirut strikes and Iran deal rhetoric continue as distant background noise with minimal energy market impact. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Trump puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East tensions continue without escalation. Indirect energy price risk for Portugal remains minimal this cycle.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in Cártama, Spain — neighboring Iberia, minor safety incident at a festival with no lasting impact on Portugal's tourism economy.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan bilateral deal — negligible direct impact on Portugal, though it signals continued post-Brexit UK trade activity outside EU frameworks.
